stories.title: Cubs 23, Padres 3 — Swanson Drives In 8 From the 9-Hole, Suzuki Hits 100th Career HR

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Dansby Swanson hit three home runs and drove in 8 runs batting NINTH on July 1.

8 RBIs from the 9-hole. Second most in MLB history from that spot.

The Cubs beat the Padres 23-3 and tied their franchise record with 8 HRs in a game.

#Cubs #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Seiya Suzuki hit his 100th career MLB home run on July 1.

He is the fourth Japanese-born player in MLB history to reach that milestone — joining Shohei Ohtani, Hideki Matsui, and Ichiro Suzuki.

#Cubs #MLB

article.headline: Cubs 23, Padres 3: Swanson's 8 RBI From the 9-Hole and Suzuki's 100th Homer Define a Historic Night

image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: All-Star Voting Closes Today — Rosters Set for July 6, Derby on Netflix July 13

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
MLB All-Star Phase 2 voting closes at noon today.

Rosters will be announced July 6. The All-Star Game is July 14 at Citizens Bank Park.

The Home Run Derby is July 13 — on Netflix.

#MLB #AllStar

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kyle Schwarber leads MLB with 30 home runs. He is the defending Home Run Derby champion.

He says he will compete in the Derby at his home park on two conditions: he makes the All-Star team and a back issue clears up.

Voting closes today at noon. #Phillies #MLB

article.headline: All-Star Voting Closes at Noon — Rosters July 6, Derby on Netflix July 13

stories.title: deGrom Hits 100+ MPH Again — The Rangers Have a Second-Half Ace

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Jacob deGrom threw five pitches at 100+ mph against Cleveland on July 1.

His top speed: 100.5 mph. His first 100+ mph readings since April 23, 2023.

7 innings. 9 Ks. Rangers win 4-2.

The velocity is back. #Rangers #MLB

article.headline: The Velocity Is Back: deGrom Hits 100 MPH Again and the Rangers Have a Second-Half Weapon

stories.title: The Skubal Trade Market Is Real — Tigers Set Their Price, Three Teams Lead

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Tarik Skubal trade market is taking shape.

Tigers' reported ask: one elite prospect plus two or three pieces — an MLB-ready pitcher and a power bat.

The Dodgers, Yankees, Blue Jays, and Padres are the front runners.

August 3 deadline. #MLB #TradeDeadline

article.headline: The Skubal Market Has a Price: Tigers Set Their Ask, Three Teams Are In

stories.title: White Sox Hold AL Central Lead — The Division No One Saw Coming

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Chicago White Sox are leading the AL Central.

In 2024, they went 41-121.

In 2026, they are approximately 41-37 and hold first place over the Guardians.

Munetaka Murakami hit 7 HRs in his first 21 MLB games — more than any Japanese-born player ever had.

#WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: From 41-121 to AL Central Leaders: The White Sox Turnaround Nobody Predicted
